signInDescription: Sign in to continue working inside Sawiyaa.
signInDescriptionPatient: Sign in to access your personal Sawiyaa experience.
signInDescriptionPractitioner: Sign in to continue your practitioner workflow on Sawiyaa.
signInDescriptionAdmin: Sign in to access Sawiyaa operations and admin tools.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If the account exists, a password reset message has been sent.
forgotPassword.errorMessage: Unable to send a reset code right now. Please try again.
forgotPassword.step2Description: Enter the verification code we sent to your email.
forgotPassword.step3Description: Code verified. Set a strong new password to finish recovery.
forgotPassword.resetSuccessMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
forgotPassword.cooldownMessage: You can request a new code in {seconds} seconds.
forgotPassword.otpEmailInfoLabel: We sent a verification code to:

errors.patientAccountNotFound: No patient account is registered with this email.
errors.practitionerAccountNotFound: No practitioner account is registered with this email.
errors.practitionerEmailOnPatientPage: This email is registered as a practitioner account. Use practitioner password recovery.
errors.patientEmailOnPractitionerPage: This email is registered as a patient account. Use patient password recovery.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

loginError: The email or password is incorrect.
otpError: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
registrationError: Unable to create the account right now.
signUpDescriptionPatient: Create a patient account to start your journey on Sawiyaa.
signUpDescriptionPractitioner: Create a practitioner account and continue onboarding on Sawiyaa.

signUpRoleDescriptions.patient: I want to book sessions or get support
signUpRoleDescriptions.practitioner: I want to join Sawiyaa as a specialist

signUpGuidance.patientSubtitle: Create your account, then continue your care journey with confidence.
signUpGuidance.practitionerSubtitle: Create your account first. Your full application happens after sign-in.
signUpGuidance.patientNext: After creating your account, you can complete your profile and choose a suitable specialist.
signUpGuidance.practitionerNext: After creating your account, you will complete your application step by step. The team will review it before activating your practitioner profile.

c1.title: Create your account
c1.desc: Set your name, email, and password.

c2.title: Choose your specialist
c2.desc: Browse or use guided matching if available.

c3.title: Book and continue
c3.desc: Schedule sessions and track your progress.

p2.title: Complete onboarding
p2.desc: Add profile details and required documents.

p3.title: Admin review
p3.desc: Your application is reviewed before activation.

signUpInitialSpecialty.title: Initial specialty information
signUpInitialSpecialty.helper: You can update this later while completing your application.

otpEmailHint: Use this email for verification codes. Leave it empty to use your login email.
practitionerRegistrationHint: Create your account first. Practitioner type is finalized by admin after reviewing your documents.
practitionerRegistrationSuccess: Practitioner account created successfully. Please sign in to continue verification.

practitionerSpecialties.emptyForCategory: No sub-specialties are available for this primary specialty.

validation.categoryRequired: Please choose a primary specialty first.
validation.subSpecialtyRequired: Please choose at least one sub-specialty.

practitionerOtpHint: Practitioner sign-in uses a second verification step after password confirmation.
verifyOtpDescription: Enter the code sent to {target} to finish practitioner sign-in.
googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not available yet. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in frontend env and GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in backend env.
googleLoginError: Unable to continue with Google right now.
googleScriptError: Google sign-in could not be loaded right now.
googleMissingCredential: Google did not return a usable sign-in token.

testCredentials.title: Use the seeded account for this path
testCredentials.description: Fill the form instantly during local testing.

signIn.title: Sign in — Sawiyaa
signIn.description: Sign in to your Sawiyaa account as a patient, practitioner, or admin.

signUp.title: Create account - Sawiyaa
signUp.description: Create a new Sawiyaa account to continue your journey.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Reset password — Sawiyaa
forgotPasswordPage.description: Request a password reset code to recover access to your Sawiyaa account.

authShell.title: A calmer, clearer way into Sawiyaa
authShell.description: Choose the right workspace first. The next step stays focused on the exact flow your account actually uses.

entryTitle: Choose how you want to continue
entryDescription: Pick the access path that matches your account.

patient.title: Continue as a patient
patient.description: Access practitioners, sessions, and your care journey.

practitioner.title: Continue as a practitioner
practitioner.description: Open your practitioner workspace and continue your workflow.

admin.title: Continue as admin
admin.description: Access operations, moderation, and internal admin tools.
admin.supportNote: Admin access is provisioned internally. Public self-signup is not available.

patientSignUp.name: Name
patientSignUp.nameHint: You can use letters, numbers, and dots.
patientSignUp.pricingNote: We'll detect your country automatically to show the correct currency and pricing.
patientSignUp.guidanceTitle: A simple start for your care
patientSignUp.guidanceSubtitle: Create your account then book your first session with confidence on Sawiyaa.
patientSignUp.guidanceNote: After creating your account, choose your specialist and book your first session.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
